council.headline: The rebalance executed and reconciled, trimming wave and cap while increasing edel, real, and jesse inside a newly ratified defensive posture of about 38% cash, 37% base, and 25% high beta (down from about 41/39/20); realized post-execution weights are not yet available to confirm the achieved posture against that target.

signalExample.name: Defactor
signalExample.body: Appeared in 6/7 daily runs across messyinfra and base01 and base02 over the 7-day lookback. Appeared in 5/7 source run(s) with avg rank 2.60 and best rank 2.

weeklyHighlights: base01 held 6 council sessions this week — 6 signed and reconciled on Base.
REAL showed up consistently across fund screens this week — a leading aggregate candidate, not an automatic trade.

readerNotes.text: Fund pages in the app now include full council minutes — open any fund and tap Council to read what the portfolio committee debated, what the Chair decided, and whether trades were executed.

link.label: How the AI investment council works

readerNotes.text: We publish two live workflow test funds (base01 and base02) alongside the read-only Guru Lotus snapshots. Every change on those test funds goes through screening, council review, and signed execution — the same path future AI-managed funds will use.
